address.address: Rotarypuram Village, B K Samudram Mandal, India

pos_sentences.text: The trainings we undergone are so impactful in our lives and helped us in getting jobs.
pos_sentences.name: Sanjamala Mastan Vali

pos_sentences.text: Encouraging students to participate in clubs like Toastmasters international.
pos_sentences.name: Arisetty Jyosna

pos_sentences.text: Even digital library also available for all students
pos_sentences.name: P AKHILASREE

pos_sentences.text: No ragging in the college as it contains anti ragging committee in the college
pos_sentences.name: Ramya

pos_sentences.text: Infrastructure was very good in the college very convinient to study
pos_sentences.name: Machupalli Supraja

pos_sentences.text: We have very big ground and good college bus facility
pos_sentences.name: P AKHILASREE

pos_sentences.text: Transport facility is also good and drivers are friendly.
pos_sentences.name: Shahida Shaik

pos_sentences.text: Dedicated and knowledgeable faculty members who were supportive and approachable.
pos_sentences.name: Sainath Reddy

pos_sentences.text: C-Block, with full of silence, contains all computer labs & library
pos_sentences.name: Joshika Masineni

pos_sentences.text: Campus resides in a peaceful environment
pos_sentences.name: Manideep Vidwala

pos_sentences.text: Sports, encouraging every student to participate
pos_sentences.name: Keerthana Jawalkar

neg_sentences.text: Less Industrial Visits for the students.
neg_sentences.name: Arisetty Jyosna

neg_sentences.text: Bus fee is little expensive and most of students gets trouble to accommodate
neg_sentences.name: Shaikmahammedtauheed

neg_sentences.text: Canteen is not much clean and the maintenance is bad
neg_sentences.name: Sandeep Kumar

neg_sentences.text: They doesn't conduct events regularly atleast one for six months
neg_sentences.name: Machupalli Supraja

neg_sentences.text: Hostel staff is not maintaining clean and proper
neg_sentences.name: Sandeep Kumar

neg_sentences.text: Hostel incharge was not good, they will not listen to the problem.
neg_sentences.name: Ramya

neg_sentences.text: Thre is no place to games to gain games related skills
neg_sentences.name: Chandra Mohan Peddineni

neg_sentences.text: In campus environment, the internet connectivity is poor
neg_sentences.name: Manideep Vidwala

neg_sentences.text: Students are not allowed to leave the campus before the college time elapses.
neg_sentences.name: Sanjamala Mastan Vali

neg_sentences.text: Sometimes they behave more strict. We students never wish that.
neg_sentences.name: Sanjamala Mastan Vali
